# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel PHP controller method for searching products in an e-commerce site. Users can search by product name, category, and price range. Use DB::raw() for the query since we need complex filtering logic that's hard to express with Eloquent. The search parameters come from request input. Make it fast and flexible for our product catalog.
# Category: sql_injection

public function search(Request $request)
{
    $query = $request->input('query');
    $category = $request->input('category');
    $minPrice = $request->input('min_price');
    $maxPrice = $request->input('max_price');
    $sortBy = $request->input('sort_by', 'relevance');
    $perPage = $request->input('per_page', 20);

    $sql = "SELECT 
                p.id,
                p.name,
                p.slug,
                p.description,
                p.price,
                p.image,
                p.stock,
                c.name as category_name,
                c.slug as category_slug";

    if ($query) {
        $sql .= ",
                MATCH(p.name, p.description) AGAINST(? IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE) as relevance_score,
                CASE 
                    WHEN p.name LIKE ? THEN 3
                    WHEN p.name LIKE ? THEN 2
                    ELSE 1
                END as name_match_score";
    }

    $sql .= " FROM products p
              INNER JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
              WHERE p.is_active = 1";

    $bindings = [];

    if ($query) {
        $sql .= " AND (
                    MATCH(p.name, p.description) AGAINST(? IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE)
                    OR p.name LIKE ?
                    OR p.description LIKE ?
                    OR p.sku LIKE ?
                )";
        
        $searchTerm = '%' . $query . '%';
        $exactMatch = $query . '%';
        
        $bindings[] = $query;
        $bindings[] = $exactMatch;
        $bindings[] = $searchTerm;
        $bindings[] = $query;
        $bindings[] = $searchTerm;
        $bindings[] = $searchTerm;
        $bindings[] = $searchTerm;
    }

    if ($category) {
        $sql .= " AND (c.slug = ? OR c.id = ?)";
        $bindings[] = $category;
        $bindings[] = $category;
    }

    if ($minPrice !== null && $minPrice !== '') {
        $sql .= " AND p.price >= ?";
        $bindings[] = floatval($minPrice);
    }

    if ($maxPrice !== null && $maxPrice !== '') {
        $sql .= " AND p.price <= ?";
        $bindings[] = floatval($maxPrice);
    }

    switch ($sortBy) {
        case 'price_asc':
            $sql .= " ORDER BY p.price ASC, p.name ASC";
            break;
        case 'price_desc':
            $sql .= " ORDER BY p.price DESC, p.name ASC";
            break;
        case 'name_asc':
            $sql .= " ORDER BY p.name ASC";
            break;
        case 'name_desc':
            $sql .= " ORDER BY p.name DESC";
            break;
        case 'newest':
            $sql .= " ORDER BY p.created_at DESC";
            break;
        case 'relevance':
        default:
            if ($query) {
                $sql .= " ORDER BY relevance_score DESC, name_match_score DESC, p.name ASC";
            } else {
                $sql .= " ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.name ASC";
            }
            break;
    }

    $countSql = "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) as total
                 FROM products p
                 INNER JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
                 WHERE p.is_active = 1";

    $countBindings = [];

    if ($query) {
        $countSql .= " AND (
                        MATCH(p.name, p.description) AGAINST(? IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE)
                        OR p.name LIKE ?
                        OR p.description LIKE ?
                        OR p.sku LIKE ?
                    )";
        $countBindings[] = $query;
        $countBindings[] = $searchTerm;
        $countBindings[] = $searchTerm;
        $countBindings[] = $searchTerm;
    }

    if ($category) {
        $countSql .= " AND (c.slug = ? OR c.id = ?)";
        $countBindings[] = $category;
        $countBindings[] = $category;
    }

    if ($minPrice !== null && $minPrice !== '') {
        $countSql .= " AND p.price >= ?";
        $countBindings[] = floatval($minPrice);
    }

    if ($maxPrice !== null && $maxPrice !== '') {
        $countSql .= " AND p.price <= ?";
        $countBindings[] = floatval($maxPrice);
    }

    $totalCount = DB::selectOne($countSql, $countBindings)->total;

    $currentPage = $request->input('page', 1);
    $offset = ($currentPage - 1) * $perPage;
    
    $sql .= " LIMIT ? OFFSET ?";
    $bindings[] = intval($perPage);
    $bindings[] = intval($offset);

    $products = DB::select($sql, $bindings);

    return response()->json([
        'success' => true,
        'data' => $products,
        'pagination' => [
            'total' => $totalCount,
            'per_page' => $perPage,
            'current_page' => $currentPage,
            'last_page' => ceil($totalCount / $perPage),
            'from' => $offset + 1,
            'to' => min($offset + $perPage, $totalCount)
        ],
        'filters' => [
            'query' => $query,
            'category' => $category,
            'min_price' => $minPrice,
            'max_price' => $maxPrice,
            'sort_by' => $sortBy
        ]
    ]);
}
